code:
import io
import string

fn classify(_ s: String) -> String
  let n = string.len(s)
  if n <= 3
    "short"
  else if n <= 7
    "medium"
  else
    "long"
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  mut running = true
  while running
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(line)
      if not string.is_empty(line)
        let cat = classify(line)
        println("#{line} -> #{cat}")
      end
    when None
      running = false
    end
  end
end
